description: Represents an intermediate table that stores cached query results within a collaboration

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 36  
Maximum Length: 36  
Pattern: ^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$  
Update requires: No interruption
